summary: Iteration 12 testing complete. All features verified: 1) Brand name 'AI' highlighted in accent color (#ff9b7a) in nav logo, hero label, chat sidebar title, and footer logo using .brand-ai CSS class, 2) Chat welcome messages in DE/EN/NL have structured 3-point list (Prozessanalyse, Systemintegration, Use Cases), 3) Chat presets are lead-oriented questions, 4) Chat LLM responses use markdown formatting (bold, numbered lists), 5) Chat CTA button shows 'Kostenloses Strategiegespräch', 6) Contact form has VORNAME/NACHNAME labels, 7) Booking flow works end-to-end, 8) Admin login works, 9) Language switching DE/EN/NL works, 10) All 11 landing page sections render, 11) All buttons have rounded corners (border-radius: 6px).
